scope: Browser-level Jitsi handoff for /calls/[roomId] after API provider returns URL-only join contract.

codeChange.summary: /calls runtime now treats jitsi/manual join contracts as external provider handoff instead of surfacing video_provider_unavailable.

observed: Lobby rendered with Join button and disabled camera/microphone selects.
Playwright locator click, DOM-CUA click, and coordinate CUA click on the Join button produced no POST /sessions/start or /join-token network events.
Chrome CDP Browser.grantPermissions was not supported in this runtime.
Browser screenshot capture timed out through CDP.
chromeAttempt.impact: OBS virtual webcam / real Chrome permission traversal remains unverified; this evidence covers product Jitsi handoff behavior in Chromium, not actual Chrome media-device selection.

remainingRisk: Full media matrix still needs actual Chrome/OBS or another controllable real-browser setup for permission prompt, device selection, external Jitsi join, audio/video presence, leave/rejoin, and remote participant behavior.
